title: Forbidden Fables
description: An RPG inspired Quilt modpack about adventuring and Role Playing alone or with friends!
body: Forbidden Fables is an RPG Inspired 1.20.1 Quilt Modpack about adventuring in a world alone or with friends. Level up your skills, become a Rogue, WIzard, Paladin, Warrior, Vampire or anything in between. Explore the world and complete quests. Role play as your own character in a fantasy world inspired by D&D. Level Up, Become Powerful, Rule The World!
